            engine.world.gravity.y = gravity;
            const render = Render.create({

        "CursorFollow.useCallback[calculateOffset]": ()=>{

            let newOffset;
            switch(align){
                case 'center':
                    newOffset = {
                        x: width / 2,
                        y: height / 2
                    };
                    break;
                case 'top':
                    newOffset = {
                        x: width / 2,
                        y: height + sideOffset
                    };
                    break;
                case 'top-left':
                    newOffset = {
                        x: width + sideOffset,
                        y: height + sideOffset
                    };
                    break;
                case 'top-right':

                        x: -sideOffset,
                        y: height + sideOffset
                    };
                    break;
                case 'bottom':

                        x: width / 2,
                        y: -sideOffset
                    };

                        x: width + sideOffset,
                        y: -sideOffset
                    };
                    break;
                case 'bottom-right':
                    newOffset = {
                        x: -sideOffset,
                        y: -sideOffset
                    };
                    break;
                case 'left':
                    newOffset = {
                        x: width + sideOffset,
                        y: height / 2
                    };
                    break;
                case 'right':
                    newOffset = {
                        x: -sideOffset,
                        y: height / 2
                    };
                    break;
                default:

                        x: 0,
                        y: 0
                    };

const STEP_DURATION = 4000;
const Workflow = ({ activeTab, setActiveTab, setWorkflowProgress, initialTabId })=>{
    _s();
    const [inputValue, setInputValue] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__$5b$project$5d2f$node_modules$2f$next$2f$dist$2f$compiled$2f$react$2f$index$2e$js__$5b$app$2d$client$5d$__$28$ecmascript$29$__["useState"])('');

    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__$5b$project$5d2f$node_modules$2f$next$2f$dist$2f$compiled$2f$react$2f$index$2e$js__$5b$app$2d$client$5d$__$28$ecmascript$29$__["useState"])(false);
    const [showConnecting, setShowConnecting] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__$5b$project$5d2f$node_modules$2f$next$2f$dist$2f$compiled$2f$react$2f$index$2e$js__$5b$app$2d$client$5d$__$28$ecmascript$29$__["useState"])(false);
    const [showExecutionSummary, setShowExecutionSummary] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__$5b$project$5d2f$node_modules$2f$next$2f$dist$2f$compiled$2f$react$2f$index$2e$js__$5b$app$2d$client$5d$__$28$ecmascript$29$__["useState"])(false);
    const fullText = 'Summarize daily team updates from Slack and email';
    const handleDescribeWorkflow = (cleanup)=>{
        setActiveTab(initialTabId);
        setInputValue('');
        setIsLoading(false);
        setShowConnecting(false);
        setShowExecutionSummary(false);
        const characters = fullText.split('');
        let currentCharIndex = 0;
        const typingInterval = setInterval(()=>{
            if (currentCharIndex < characters.length) {
                setInputValue(characters.slice(0, currentCharIndex + 1).join(''));
                currentCharIndex++;
            } else {
                clearInterval(typingInterval);
            }
        }, STEP_DURATION / characters.length);
        // Register cleanup for this interval
        cleanup();
        return typingInterval;
    };
    const handleConnectTools = ()=>{
        setActiveTab('connect-tools');
        setInputValue(fullText);
        setIsLoading(true);
        setShowConnecting(true);
        setShowExecutionSummary(false);
    };
    const handleReviewAndRefine = ()=>{
        setActiveTab('review-and-refine');
        setInputValue('Workflow completed successfully');
        setIsLoading(false);
        setShowConnecting(false);
        setShowExecutionSummary(true);
    };
    (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__$5b$project$5d2f$node_modules$2f$next$2f$dist$2f$compiled$2f$react$2f$index$2e$js__$5b$app$2d$client$5d$__$28$ecmascript$29$__["useEffect"])({
        "Workflow.useEffect": ()=>{
            let activeIntervals = [];
            let currentAnimationFrameId = null;
            let isRunning = false;
            const clearAllIntervals = {
                "Workflow.useEffect.clearAllIntervals": ()=>{
                    activeIntervals.forEach({
                        "Workflow.useEffect.clearAllIntervals": (interval)=>clearInterval(interval)
                    }["Workflow.useEffect.clearAllIntervals"]);
                    activeIntervals = [];
                    if (currentAnimationFrameId !== null) {
                        cancelAnimationFrame(currentAnimationFrameId);
                        currentAnimationFrameId = null;
                    }
                }
            }["Workflow.useEffect.clearAllIntervals"];
            // Determine starting step based on activeTab
            const getStartingStep = {
                "Workflow.useEffect.getStartingStep": ()=>{
                    if (activeTab === 'connect-tools') return 2;
                    if (activeTab === 'review-and-refine') return 3;
                    return 1 // initialTabId (describe-workflow)
                    ;
                }
            }["Workflow.useEffect.getStartingStep"];
            const runWorkflow = {
                "Workflow.useEffect.runWorkflow": (startStep = 1)=>{
                    if (isRunning) return;
                    isRunning = true;
                    clearAllIntervals();
                    let step = startStep - 1 // We'll increment it first in runStep
                    ;
                    const runStep = {
                        "Workflow.useEffect.runWorkflow.runStep": ()=>{
                            step++;
                            if (step > 3) {
                                setTimeout({
                                    "Workflow.useEffect.runWorkflow.runStep": ()=>{
                                        isRunning = false;
                                        runWorkflow();
                                    }
                                }["Workflow.useEffect.runWorkflow.runStep"], 1000);
                                return;
                            }
                            // Execute the appropriate step function
                            let stepInterval;
                            if (step === 1) {
                                stepInterval = handleDescribeWorkflow(clearAllIntervals);
                            } else if (step === 2) {
                                handleConnectTools();
                            } else if (step === 3) {
                                handleReviewAndRefine();
                            }
                            if (stepInterval) {
                                activeIntervals.push(stepInterval);
                            }
                            // Animate progress from 0 to 100 over STEP_DURATION
                            setWorkflowProgress(0);
                            const startTime = Date.now();
                            const animateProgress = {
                                "Workflow.useEffect.runWorkflow.runStep.animateProgress": ()=>{
                                    const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
                                    const progress = Math.min(elapsed / STEP_DURATION * 100, 100);
                                    setWorkflowProgress(progress);
                                    if (progress < 100) {
                                        currentAnimationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(animateProgress);
                                    } else {
                                        currentAnimationFrameId = null;
                                        // Move to next step after current step completes
                                        runStep();
                                    }
                                }
                            }["Workflow.useEffect.runWorkflow.runStep.animateProgress"];
                            currentAnimationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(animateProgress);
                        }
                    }["Workflow.useEffect.runWorkflow.runStep"];
                    runStep();
                }
            }["Workflow.useEffect.runWorkflow"];
            // Start workflow from the clicked tab's step
            const startingStep = getStartingStep();
            runWorkflow(startingStep);
            return ({
                "Workflow.useEffect": ()=>{
                    clearAllIntervals();
                    isRunning = false;
                }
            })["Workflow.useEffect"];
        // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
        }
    }["Workflow.useEffect"], [
        activeTab
    ]);

                    window.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);

        "AnimatedProgressBar.useEffect": ()=>{
            // Clear any existing animations
            if (animationRef.current) {

                animationRef.current = null;
            }
            if (delayTimeoutRef.current) {

                setDisplayedNumber(0);
                return;

            // Current active item: animate from 0 to target

                "AnimatedProgressBar.useEffect.startAnimation": ()=>{

                        }

                }

            if (isFirstItem && isActive) {

                setCurrentProgress(0);
                setDisplayedNumber(0);

                    "AnimatedProgressBar.useEffect": ()=>{
                        startAnimation();
                    }
                }["AnimatedProgressBar.useEffect"], 300);

                startAnimation();
            }

                    }
                }
